rule: Ensure pre-commit hooks are installed before making any commits
rationale: Hooks enforce code quality gates automatically on every commit. How to install them is project-specific — use the lint_command from get_project_setup to install and verify.

rule: Never commit directly to main or master
rationale: All changes must go through a feature branch and pull request to maintain code review and CI/CD integrity.

rule: Feature branches must follow naming convention: feature/{TICKET-ID}+{summary-slug}
rationale: Consistent branch naming links code changes back to JIRA tickets and makes history easy to navigate.

rule: Run the full test suite before committing
rationale: Prevents regressions from being committed. Use the test_command from get_project_setup for the project-specific command.
